source: FM 17-33 The Tank Battalion, Light and Medium
items.extraction_note: Training centers on platoon movement, gunnery, target recognition, map use, and command under combined arms.
Gunnery training is explicit and specialized; crew coordination is a drilled skill, not an improvisation.
Visibility and risk trade off between hatch-open awareness and buttoned safety.
The commander needs both terrain interpretation and a precise way to move information upward.
